info.name: Nuqta API
info.description:
Nuqta POS & Inventory Management backend — OpenAPI 3.0 documentation.

All monetary values are in minor units (e.g. Iraqi Dinars with no sub-unit).

Contact Support:
 Name: Nuqta Team
